entry.title: SAC - Story Calculate Entire Dataset Average
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working for calculating R square in STORY with output dataset of a predictive scenario.

My data looks like this:

ManufacturerSizeWattage1 pc USD
A300310
A400120
B5000.510
B600120

and the desired output should look like this

ManufacturerSizeWattage1 pc USDMean
A30031015
A40012015
B5000.51015
B60012015

with the mean of [1 pc USD], then I can get Sum of Square Total and R Square in advanced.

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Develop and deploy a HTML (Angular/Vue/React) app on SAP BTP (Cloud Foundry) access S/4 On-premi
entry.content:
Hi @CAPMDeveloper00 

"Angular app create successfully, in folder `webapp`,".

The angular app shall be created under a separate folder named `webapp`.

 

@CAPMDeveloper00 @natalymoros 

During I writing this post, I don't get my github user for my SAP ID. Hence, I don't have the git repo in github. Now I got my github user, I will consider add the git repo later on.

 

Hope it helps.

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements extending search filter
entry.content:
Will the 'Customer Filter' helps?

Refer to Flexible Programming Model Explorer.

Or, you can using Extension to create your own SmartFilterBar for filtering.

entry.title: Data schedule in SAP DataSphere using Cron expression
entry.content:
In SAP DataSphere, I want to load a remote table daily twice a day during weekdays till the 20th of every month. 
For that I used attached Cron expression but the job is still running after 20th of that month also. 
If you have inputs to how to achieve it.

entry.title: Re: can we use Pain.001.001 for domestic payments in non-...
entry.content:
Hello Pratik,

As per my knowledge you can do this only if the bank will accept this file format/structure. If the bank does, then they can also provide you the detailed requirements.

Best Regards,
Henk Hoogerbrug

entry.title: Error in SAC story indicating that a measure is hidden
entry.content: When creating a story on a model based on live connection to SAP Hana, an error is thrown indicating that some datapoints will not be displayed as the measure is hidden. Now the measure is not hidden in the story or in the back end (CDS view) as checked with the backend resources. Would like to know why the error may be displaying.

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements extending search filter
entry.content: Thanks! Will dive in your tip. It should be triggered when using the Search field. I am using RAP as well, so the ObjectPage is generated out of the box. I could enhance that, but it is a big change.

entry.title: Re: DISTINCT OCRD from OINV
entry.content:
Hi,

Please give this a try:

SELECT distinct T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."CardType", T0."GroupCode"
, T0."CmpPrivate", T0."Address"
, cast(T0."Building" as nvarchar) as "Building"
, T0."StreetNo", T0."ZipCode"
, T0."City", T0."County", T0."State1", T0."Country", T0."CntctPrsn", T0."E_Mail"
, T0."Phone1", T0."LicTradNum", T2."Tel1", T2."U_Ext"
, T2."E_MailL"

FROM OCRD T0 INNER JOIN OINV T1 ON T0."CardCode" = T1."CardCode" INNER JOIN OCPR T2 ON T1."CntctCode" = T2."CntctCode"

WHERE T1."DocDate" >= '20240101'

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: DEPRECATED: req._queryOptions what to use to extract...
entry.content:
Hi Dinu, thanks for response but not sure what you mean. I cannot even use the above property -> 

console.log("Test:", req.query.limit);

and got below error: [cds] - ❗️Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'limit')
But using "req.http?.req?.query" works for me now.

entry.title: Re: Batch managing in SAP B1
entry.content: Hi @MarinaLevy , just to clarify, do you want to assign the same batch to the component & the finished item?

entry.title: Re: Trend Micro Deep Security reports HEU_AEGIS_CRYPT err...

Hi Dan,

Is it not possible to just add an exception for the DI API in general?

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: How to limit column in an SAC story with rank values to top 50
entry.content:
I would like to know how a story with a table in SAP Analytic cloud can be filtered to display only records pertaining to top 50 values of a rank column in the story. I added the rank column on a existing measure using the 'Client Calculation' option available. Now I cannot access this new rank column like other measures as it is a runtime calculation. Can anyone let me know if this is feasible, if so, please let me know how.

 

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Need to move my blog
entry.content:
@santhana_krishnan  Can you please reach out to us at community@sap.com and we will be happy to assist you:) Please mention in the Email where the blogs should be moved to.

Regards,

Moshe

entry.title: Re: Need another field in "Manage Customer Line Items" or "Manage Supplier Line Items
entry.content:
Hello everyone, @Angelika_Huber , @steffenriemann 

I hope you're doing well.

I have a question regarding the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (2-system landscape). In the "Manage Supplier Line Items" app, I’ve added four custom fields — GST Base Amount, CGST Amount, SGST Amount, and IGST Amount — using the Custom Fields and Logic app. However, these fields are currently displaying zero values and are not fetching the expected data.

If anyone has faced a similar issue or knows how to resolve this, I would really appreciate your guidance or suggestions. Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Latest Syntax In SAP RAP.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I want to know about the latest syntax in SAP RAP as of 2025 where can i get it ?

Also how can i stay updated for future developments?

Regards,

Basant

entry.title: Re: How can I make non-key field columns editable on Fior...
entry.content:
Hi, for learning purposes of RAP object, you may also check this blog Creating a Multi-Item Edit Screen in RAP Similar to SM30.The basic idea is to virtualize a root RAP object entity and in its object page, you have the multi-item edit functionality.

But since TVARVC is a G table, you need to consider transport stuff, so @junwe mentioned that Business Configuration Maintenance Object is more suitable for your productive usage.

BRs,

Archer

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors New People profile - Questions
entry.content: Hi @Kelly_Segovia , for your integration, is this permission required for all employees? As per KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3594795/E , this permission is intended to be used only for system administrators in order to perform API actions, hence is not recommended to provided such permissions for regular users.

entry.title: Re: Migration Tooling now supporting migration via the pipeline approach
entry.content:
@prasanthi_chavala you should open an incident ticket on the support component LOD-HCI-PI-WT-IFL

Alex

entry.title: Implementation of a Task Center Third Party Connector for ERP Systems (Non-S/4HANA)
entry.content:
Simplify Task Management with SAP Task Center’s Third Party Connector

Looking to simplify and centralize task handling across multiple ERP systems, including non-SAP platforms? With the SAP Task Center's Third Party Connector, you can seamlessly integrate non-SAP systems into a unified task management hub. Experience dynamic task filters, multi-language support, mass approvals, custom attributes, and much more—all in a single interface tailored to your needs.

We’ve successfully implemented and validated the SAP Task Center Third Party Connector for SAP ERP systems (non-S/4HANA). The POC was based on the great and detailed implementation Guidelines provided by SAP.

Proven Results with SAP ERP Systems (Non-S/4HANA)

We’ve successfully implemented and validated the SAP Task Center Third Party Connector for SAP ERP (non-S/4HANA) systems. Using SAP’s detailed Third-Party Adoption Guide, our proof of concept (PoC) demonstrated how the Task Center can efficiently manage tasks from diverse systems, creating a scalable and flexible solution for heterogeneous landscapes.

This article outlines the implementation of a Third Party Connector for ERP systems based on official SAP documentation. We’ll cover the fundamental configuration steps, highlight the achieved results, and showcase the benefits of this solution.

Prerequisites

In fact the integration of any Third Party System needs to fulfill the following prerequisites:

  1. Interface definition as described in the adoption guideline provided by SAP. Having a deeper look on the definition it is mostly an oData v4 standard service
    SAP Task Center Third-Party Adoption Guide 
  2. User Mapping between local user id and ID in IAS / CIS to assign tasks to the correct SCIM Global User ID. This could also be handled in a dedicated middleware.
  3. Technical access to provide capabilities of the interface, task definitions and tasks as described here
    SAP Documentation: Primary Destination with Technical User Third-Party Task Provider
    The primary destination ensures secure and reliable communication between the Task Provider and the Task Center, using a technical user for authentication.
  4. Single Sign On access for read further details like description, attachments, comments and to execute the actions on the tasks like approve or reject. Check the following link for more details:
    SAP Documentation: Secondary Destination for Principal Propagation Third-Party Task Provider
    This destination ensures proper user context propagation, allowing actions in the Task Center to be executed on behalf of the authenticated user.

All feature of a Third Party Connector, like attachment, comments, bulk or substitutions can be implemented step by step and switch on after implementation.

Implementation and Architecture

The implementation was split into three parts

  • SAP BTP based Cloud Foundry Service to handle the requests (mainly oData v4)
  • SAP ERP Task Center Backend Service (odata v2) to handle the requests from BTP based on a technical user
  • SAP Standard Task Processing Service used by Standard My Inbox Application to handle the SSO based requests

The following image shows up the final architecture of the implementation:

Integrating SAP Standard Task Processing Standard Service pushed the speed of the development dramatically. We didn't had to cover standard actions, like

  • Reading Attachments, Comments, Description of the task
  • Claiming, Forwarding Tasks
  • Performing Actions (approve, reject a.s.o.) on tasks
  • Integrate Detail Screens as used in My Inbox Scenarios (e.g. Approve Leave Request V3)

Now we are focusing on decoupling the Task Processing Service and moving more and more functionalities to our implementation. The following screen shows the integration the Approve Leave Request V3 Service in the Task Center:

The screen is split into three parts

  1. Task Center View
  2. My Inbox Scenario "Approve Leave Request V3"
  3. Task Center Actions to execute them directly via Task Center

Achievements and Features

The implementation of the connector brings numerous benefits that significantly enhance task management:

1. Connector Setup for Standard ERP Systems

The connector enables the integration of tasks from ERP systems that are not based on S/4HANA, bridging the gap to modern task management.

2. Dynamic Task Filters

Through destinations, task filters can be flexibly configured, allowing users to view only the tasks relevant to them. This improves usability and reduces complexity. Additional filter parameter can be passed by configuring the destination properties to the backend logic in order to display dedicated tasks in a separate group e.g. Leave Request Only and to reuse the connector.

3. Multi-Language Support

The application supports multiple languages, which is especially advantageous for globally operating companies. Users can view tasks in their preferred language.

4. Inplace Display of Decision Scenarios (e.g. My Inbox Detail Screens)

Tasks such as leave requests can be directly displayed and processed within the Task Center without switching applications, enhancing efficiency and providing a seamless user experience. We are delivering enhancement spots to adjust the displayed content and integrate dedicated approval screens inplace

Inplace Approval View

Standard View

5. Custom Attributes

The connector supports displaying and processing custom attributes tailored to specific business requirements. This allows to take fast decisions especially when performing mass approvals.

6. Mass Approvals (Bulk Actions)

Users can approve multiple tasks simultaneously, reducing the workload for repetitive tasks (e.g., invoice approvals).

7. Substitution Rules

Tasks can be forwarded to substitutes during absences, ensuring uninterrupted workflows.

8. Additional Features

These include support for task delegation, adaptability to specific business needs, and the ability to integrate tasks from additional systems.

Flexibility and Scalability

With the Third Party Connector, SAP Task Center becomes a versatile platform for task management. It’s not limited to ERP systems—you can also integrate CRM, HR, and further custom or non SAP applications, ensuring a truly centralized and scalable solution for diverse business environments.

Next Steps

More integrations are on the way! If you’re interested in learning how the SAP Task Center Third Party Connector can transform your task management, feel free to reach out directly:

Connect with Christoph Kuczera on LinkedIn

Let’s simplify and scale your task management together! 😊

entry.title: Re: Application Choices and Decisions for Procure to Receipt Process
entry.content: How can we easily and pragmatically compare/test the process variants and pick the best fit option?

entry.title: Re: How to manage product movement between operations in...
entry.content:
If the customer want to recode the delivery time and it's also very important, you can add a operation in the routing, and when do the confirmation of the Production order, you can recode this part time and text.

if you don't want to add a operation, you can recode the information into the Text when you do the confirmation.

entry.title: Re: Create a Simple IDoc Interface with AIF Configuration
entry.content:
yes, if you like to monitor or manage your IDocs using AIF regardless if it's a standard IDoc or a custom, you need to create an AIF interface in your own custom AIF namespace

Alex

Also, it'd be helpful if you could give me atleast a vague idea or a blog on how to extend the standard OData.

My colleague suggested to not touch the OData and just add a new OData to the Adaptation project.

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements extending search filter
entry.content: The search url contains $search=. It will only search on one field (defined in annotation / metadata). I will have to adjust the url via a binding change somehow.

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD importing .mtar file error

entry.title: Re: How to use Support User after enabling single-sign on
entry.content: Hi there.. I created a Support user in the SLD and bound the user to a test company. However, when I open up B1 I dont see that company in the list. My windows username is bound to other companies. We have about 7 other companies. Do I unbind my own username from all of them before trying to use the Support user?

entry.title: Re: Automatically add account in involved parties to lead...
entry.content:
From what I know, Involved Parties tab of the Leads can only have Partners data. 

But if you convert Leads to an Opportunity, on the Opportunities tab, it will show all Involved Parties data you need.

Do you need these information on reporting purposes or only for showing on the UI? If it's for the UI, i don't think it's possible via standard way.

This is a standard feature in FSM and also standard integration available which sends newly created service call from FSM mobile to s4hana.

entry.title: Re: CU50 in internal tables
entry.content: Where does it go if you debug? The handling of KEPH is done via a module in the dynpro SAPKCKDI 4610.

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba
entry.content: Good overview, detailed and structured information 👍

entry.title: Re: Looking for SAP Table Related to Transport Management with Freight Amount Field
entry.content: Hi Kumar, your post was incorrectly tagged with (SAP Community), we have therefore removed it. The "SAP Community" tag should only be used for content directly related to the community. Thank you for your contribution in the SAP Community! Best regards, Nadeem

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD importing .mtar file error
entry.content: Hello agpekka, we created a new sub-account for this since in our previous sub-account, the error still persists.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting - New Balance Validation Process
entry.content:
Hi Takashiro,

The accounting task is for Unreleased data. This is about having an additional validation to check the data before releasing it and validate the same (you validate the data before it enters ACDOCU).  If you are not interested in running in the data Monitor you can run it in "Run Balance Validation and View results" app, as Data Monitor is optional.

Regards,

Hari

entry.title: Re: how can I add custom tab into WBS Element for transaction CJ91/CJ92 in S4 HANA
entry.content: Hi priyanka your post was incorrectly tagged with (SAP Community), we have therefore removed it. The "SAP Community" tag should only be used for content directly related to the community. Thank you for your contribution in the SAP Community! Best regards, Nadeem

entry.content: @HermannGahm feature not supported: Cannot create statement trigger on column table

entry.title: Re: Update a translated simulation on Producer without to...
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Report Based on Delivered Qty is greater than PO Qty
entry.content:
I'm working in SAP Business ByDesign (SAP ByD) and I want to create a report that filters only records where Delivered Qty > PO Qty. I've already created a key figure for the calculation (Delivered Qty - PO Qty), and it helps me visually identify positive or negative variances, but now I want to filter the report to only show rows where Delivered Qty is greater than PO Qty.

In SAP ByD, key figures cannot be used directly as filters, 

Please Help.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: Duplicated Windows in ALT+TAB
entry.content:
Hi Peach14 
Could you please help to check and revert us back from the options in  "3480205 - Managing the Unstable Behavior of SAP Business One Browser Renderer Process"? Please disable the Fiori Cockpit in Administration → System Initialization → General Settings → Cockpit → Change it to "None" and see if this makes any difference. Also try the other suggested option from this KBA to see if this helps? 

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support.

entry.title: Quality Custom field data flow in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I am new to Public Cloud so need you help and support

There is one requirement from our customer actually they want to record a value as Quality Heat Number while doing the Usage decision and flow that value in either Stock - Multiple materials app or MMBE. So what we decided to publish a Custom field in Usage Decision and record value over there. So i need help in how to flow this custom field value in the apps i have mentioned above or if there any other solution please let me know or it can be achieved through any Business Context, Please tell me its very Urgent.

Raj

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba
entry.content: Hello @samnanda - Thanks for your kind words. If you have any other info missing here, kindly add further via Comments. It could help others.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Production Planning- EWM Synchronization🏭--📦--🏢
entry.content:
Hi Gowtham, 

thanks for the comprehensive summary. One question - 

Why are your raw materials already in P2 stock type ahead of creation and confirmation of the staging WTs? My understanding is that you've maintained stock determination rules to allow picking from F2 and avoid having to post to P2 upfront (or store as P2).

Regards, 

Hendrik

entry.title: Re: Implicit commit
entry.content:
Hi Shizofrenik,

wenn the programm ends, than will produce an Implicit Commit on the Database. That means, you have not an explicit Commit with the Command "COMMIT WORK [AND WAIT]" executed (the addition in the brackets means a synchronous executet commit: the Programm waits on tha Database. Otherwise is a asynchronous Commit and the Programm ends, while the Database is on "working").

I can mention, that in your programm the event START-OF-SELECTION is missing 😉

Congrats,

Attila

entry.title: Re: Customize HR Process Workbench (PUST)
entry.content:
Hi

Could you please provide the configuration steps for PUST / PEST HR Process workbench.

Thanks

entry.title: Quality Heat Number Flow in Public Cloud
entry.content:
I am new to Public Cloud so need you help and support

There is one requirement from our customer actually they want to record a value as Quality Heat Number while doing the Usage decision and flow that value in either Multiple Stock app or MMBE. So what we decided to publish a Custom field in Usage Decision and record value over there. So i need help in how to flow this custom field value in the apps i have mentioned above or if there any other solution please let me know or it can be achieved through any Business Context, Please tell me its very Urgent.

Raj

entry.title: Re: oninit rule not triggered after employee import
entry.content: Hello, OnInit rule is not supported when adding new employee via Import Employee Data. Hope the answer helps. Best regards, Ashley

entry.title: Re: No dedicated error message found (SWF_FLEX_WEBGUI010) in SAP GUI for workflow scenario WS0200047
entry.content:
You have to be more specific than "how this can be solved". I already described (briefly) what I did. Are you asking for more details about that, or are you asking how parameters can be passed so a message with parameters can be displayed?

The short answer to the latter is that I haven't found a way to do that, and I don't think it is possible - at least not as of the 2023 version of S/4HANA.

To give a bit more detail on the former, I didn't just create a new message, I created a new exception class which inherits from CX_RSM_AGT_DETN_BUSI_EXCEPTION and raise an exception of that type when agent determination fails. Sorry about not writing that last time, it's an important piece of the puzzle.

The new exception class is only used in the BAdI implementations. Root cause exception(s) raised by the business logic are caught, and an exception of the CX_RSM_AGT_DETN_BUSI_EXCEPTION subclass is raised with the caught exception passed to the PREVIOUS parameter.

I hope that helps you determine how to solve your issue.

entry.title: Re: Aquire to decomission process
entry.content:
If you're looking to build the acquisition process within S/4HANA PM, there is not best practice solution for it. You need to design the process according to your business needs.

That said, a high-level sketch of the process could begin with AUC creation, followed by the PR-PO cycle for procurement. The AUC is then settled against an asset for which equipment are created. Then you could create a WO to record their installation process. This could be an existing maintenance order or you could configure a new one just for this purpose. 

This is just a high-level idea. You may need to use internal orders, for capital expenditure part, you may also need to enable serialization if required. 

These are good resources: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/enterprise-asset-equipment-track-and-trace/ba-p/13473502

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/procurement-of-assets-under-construction/ba-p/13279679

entry.title: Link Original Invoice from Supplier BN to SAP S4 MIR4 GS attachment
entry.content:
We have enabled the feature NP-36965- NP-36965: Support for Marking an Invoice Attachment as the Original Invoice. In the Integration gateway we have updated mapping to pass originalInvoiceAttachmentCID the name of original marked attachment from Ariba Supplier BN.

 

Now we are looking for the ABAP Code to update this file name as original invoice in MIR4 GS attachment list from the IDOC FM IDOC_INPUT_INVOIC_MRM in SAP S4 HANA. There should be a placeholder updating the file as original invoice from Supplier as supplier would be attaching many different attachments.

 

If anyone has implemented any similar solution, please share your ideas

entry.title: Re: Asset Legacy Data Migration in New Assets Accounting (S/4 HANA)
entry.content:
Dear Shakeel,

Our go-live date was November 1, 2024, and we completed the historical asset transfer prior to this date. However, in April 2025, we identified configuration errors in the imported assets and now need to reverse and re-import them. In transaction FAA_CMP_LDT, what transfer date should we set for this correction?

Additionally, when using ABLDT, we encountered the following errors:

  1. "New transfer of cumulative values is not possible."

  2. "Value date is earlier than the posting date."

How should we resolve these issues?

Thank you for your support!

Best regards,

Sylvia

Tanya

entry.title: Re: "Date Field with input" control in build apps getting...
entry.content: Got the answer in one of the OSS notes - 3523951 - Date Field not working in SAP Build Apps - SAP for Me.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel and SAP Datasphere connection
entry.content: @SuyashPandey24 no, you can't. You have to connect through the SAC tenant.

entry.title: Re: CUSTOM LOGIC FOR INCOTERMS
entry.content: Hello Shilpa, Could you share any documentation for creating custom logic or how to extend already exsisting logics to other company codes .

entry.title: Re: HANA Vector Engine and LangChain
entry.content:
@Cocquerel : The LangChain project changed its integration model to optimize their internal review process. Due to this, we are about to deprecate our current community integration with LangChain and replace it by an external package on PyPi. Going forward, we will only maintain this external package.

Good news is that this package is already available and it supports HANA native embeddings out of the box 😊. The package itself can be found here. And there is also a PR with a changed documentation (incl. example for native embedding) on its way to the LangChain documentation.

entry.title: Re: Timestamp in SRT_MONI Reflecting When Message Was Fir...
entry.content:
Hello @ybuc 

I think that's Execution Date and Execution Time fields. There is also the UTC timestamp at last change field that combines date and time together.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Difference between Data Element and domain
entry.content:
Domain – It defines the technical attributes of a field, such as data type, length, and value range.

Data Element – It defines the semantic meaning and also includes the technical attributes of a field.

entry.title: A new field is required Children Claimed for Tax which is only req for certain rel-types
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Hope you are doing well!!

We have a requirement to create a custom Field in Dependent information for Germany Only.

 

We have created the field in Global Information for Germany which is only enabled for Dependents.

Continuing with this we have to maintain a condition for Relationship type, it should display only when Relationship type is Child or Child with Disability.

 

We have tried creating multiple rules but nothing works. We have assigned the rule to Onchange scenario on Relationship type field, also tried cross entity rules.

 

Could anyone please help us with the setup?

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAC – Integrated Financial Planning – DRIVER6 & alloc...
entry.content:
Dear @Aleque,

the End-to-End Planning Process is a sample story to explain how the different parts of the content integrate to each other and a sample planning process could look like. Therefore we deliver the business content with sample data to enable users to test the content without the need to connect to their own data.

If you conected your SAC tenant with your S/4HANA backend and imported your own data you also might want to import the drivers. To do this, please follow the instructions in the SAP Help portal, Importing Statistical Key Figures to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAP S/4HANA Cloud / SAP S/4HANA)
As an alternative you can manually plan the drivers using the SAP_FI_IFP_IM_OPEX_PlanAdmin (SAP S/4HANA Cloud / SAP S/4HANA) story.

Regarding your questions:

  1. You can either load the drivers from your S/4Hana backend or manually plan them in SAC.
  2. If you deleted the sample data in the OPEX model and imported your own fact data, you might have missed to upload the drivers, in this case they are null.
  3. There can be null values for drivers, even if the import of data was successful. This is depending on what data you're uploading.

I would recommend you our documentation Financial Planning in SAP Analytics Cloud - Getting Started with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAP S/4HANA Cloud / SAP S/4HANA)

Please let me know if this answers your questions.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: purchasing view data master data
entry.content: hello fernanda, could you kindly share any links to create such custom reportings...?

entry.title: Developer Hub - API Key management
entry.content:
Hello all,

Request your inputs on the following:

Applications are created in the Developer Hub and assigned to a specific user. An application key is generated within the application, which can be used as an x-api-key in the API proxy policy.  The application key is therefore permanently bound to the respective user.

Our question: As we have external partners who keeps changing, what happens if an external partner leaves the company or the collaboration ends? 

Is there an ideal process and best practices recommended especially in the context of external users and API key management?

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Re: Issue creating storage bins via LS01N – Missing LGTYP and LGBER values
entry.content: Please remove "SAP Extended Warehouse Management" tag. You are asking about LS01N, which is LE-WM.

entry.title: Re: Download com.sap.it.api.mapping.* jar file
entry.content:
The following article may help.

Solved: Interface ValueMappingApi is no available under pa... - SAP Community

entry.title: Performing actions from Work Zone notifications and handling it in CAP application
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have followed the Developing Cloud Foundry Applications With Notifications tutorial and successfully created an application with notifications working as expected.

Now, I am trying to enhance it by adding actions to the notifications. I am currently facing an issue in the following scenario:

Use Case: Leave Request Action

  • I have a Leave Request entity.
  • When a leave request is created, a notification is sent to the approver.
  • The notification includes an action button – for example: "Reject Leave".
  • When the user clicks the Reject action, the backend CAP Java application receives a call to the /ExecuteAction API.

 

Problem:

In the /ExecuteAction call, I want to receive the Leave Request ID (or some unique record identifier) so that I can find and reject the correct record in the backend.

I tried adding a placeholder like {leaveRequestId} in the ActionId or TargetParameters, but this did not work.

What I Need Help With:

  • How can I pass the leave's record ID or other dynamic parameters to the backend via the /ExecuteAction payload?
  • Is there a supported way to include contextual data in the action definition or payload so that the backend knows which record to act on?

entry.title: Re: Issue creating storage bins via LS01N – Missing LGTYP...
entry.content:
Hello @Sfourutilities 

Storage types and storage sections are defined in SPRO path: Logistics Execution -> Warehouse Management -> Master Data -> Define Storage Type and Define Storage Sections.

These are basic LE-WM settings defining warehouse structure.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: [Webinar] Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process (EMEA)
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM Configuration Webinar Series 2025

We are thrilled to extend a warm welcome to everyone for our SAP Cloud ALM configuration webinar series.

Topic

Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process

With this session, you will

  • Uncover the fundamental value of Change and Deployment Management within SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Learn how to enable transport management for your solutions in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Discover the core capabilities of Change and Deployment Management provided by SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Gain valuable insights into the product outlook for Change and Deployment Management.

Agenda

  • SAP Cloud ALM Overview - 5 min
  • Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process - 35 mins
  • Live Demo 15 mins
  • Q&A - 5 mins

Register Now

We look forward to seeing you virtually!

Stay updated on upcoming sessions!

For any further queries please contact us on cloudalm@sap.com

 

If you have any questions about the session topic, please feel free to post them in the comments.

entry.title: SAP AI CORE Free Tier Service
entry.content: Does SAP AI Core Free Tier provide any SAP AI units and how many? Can we use this free tier to train and deploy a machine learning model or is it just limited to exploring SAP AI Core? Also is there a way to explore all these SAP AI service and get hands on practice for free?

entry.title: Re: Preview/Print of a Document (Crystal Report) not working
entry.content: Hallo Matija,

entry.title: Re: No Rounding rule should happen for a Condition type
entry.content:
Hi @aravindrawat,

"For example, if the incoming price is 4.567, SAP should store it as 4.56, not 4.57." - If you choose rounding rule "B - Round down", it works exactly as you described.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Preview/Print of a Document (Crystal Report) not working
entry.content: Hallo Matija, thank you for the reply. The report is based on DB tables. There are no UDO/UDT's in the report. We even tried to remove everything except the head of the report and we also tried to use the document sample from https://support.boyum-it.com/hc/en-us/articles/360004532418--Crystal-Reports-Template-files still got the same error.

entry.title: Users can confirm a Production Task even after changing input item quantity to 0, bypassing the BOM
entry.content: In SAP Business ByDesign (SAP ByD), during production confirmation, the system typically uses the Bill of Materials (BOM) assigned to the Product Model to determine the quantity of input components via backflush. If users are able to manually change the input component quantity (e.g., setting it to 0) and still confirm the production task, that is a process/control issue — especially if it should be restricted to ensure BOM accuracy and material traceability.

entry.title: For which country is your request?
Information on User, Role and App ID detail
entry.content:
Dear Team,


Kindly provide details on how we can get only active user details with roles and tiles assigned to the users and the roles in one consolidated excel sheet. As we checked from the IAM Information System app we are unable to get only active users details, it is providing all the users details in excel sheet and it is also not formatted in proper manner.


Kindly guide me in a proper way on how I can get these details in a single consolidated excel sheet. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Information on User, Role and App ID detail
entry.content:
Hi

Kindly refer the below attached KBA to get "Identity and Access Management" information (i.e. business roles, logon details, price category,...)

3212871 - How to get "Identity and Access Management" information - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me

For Business User - Business Role assignment you can use View I_IAMBusinessUserBusinessRole

 

Best Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: Implicit commit
entry.content: Read online documentation on Explicit Database Commits.

entry.title: Application Job Template not working for Subcontraction Challan Creation (J_1IG_SUBCON_JT) Public C
entry.content:
Hello All,

SAP has proovided a Application Job Template for Challan Creation in Background in SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud.

However, when I attempt to schedule a background job using this template via the 'Application Jobs' app, the 'Parameters' section remains stuck in a loading state and never displays the configurable options. Can anyone provide assistance with this issue?"

Attached Screenshot for Reference.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Yogesh Shelar.

entry.title: Re: Error "FAIL: process disp+work Dispatcher not running" when running docker image
entry.content: Does your docker Container have enough Memory available? I never had this issue.

entry.title: Re: Service PO and SES not created-Monitor accruals posting app
entry.content:
Hi S_Arora,

Your post was incorrectly tagged with SAP Cloud Transport Management, we have therefore changed it for you. You can change this anytime if the tag is not correct by editing your post. Thank you for your contribution in the SAP Community!

Best regards

Kavya

entry.title: SAP Build Appsの新機能：生成AIによるエンティティからのページ作成
entry.content:
SAP Build Appsに生成AIを使用した非常に便利な新機能が追加されましたので御紹介したいと思います。
BTP Destinationを使用して作成されたエンティティを利用してのそれの読み込み・作成・編集・削除用のページの自動作成機能です。非常に楽になりますよ。

前準備

まず、生成AI機能を有効にする必要があります。有効にするにはSAP Build Appsではなく、SAP Build LobbyからControl Tower→Generative AIをクリックし

Enable Generative AIのスイッチを有効にします。

これで本機能が使用できるようになります。

注意その１：
このスイッチを有効化することにより、同じサブアカウントにあるSAP Build Process AutomationのGenerative AI機能も有効化されます。SAP Build Appsだけ/SAP Build Process Automationだけ有効にするということは出来ませんのでご注意ください。双方とも現在開発中のプロジェクトに影響は有りませんが、開発ツールの中に"これまで表示されていなかったボタンが表示される"という形で機能が追加されますので必要そうであれば開発メンバーに事前にアナウンスしたほうが良いかもしれません。
注意その２：
現在SAP Build Apps/SAP Build Process Automationの生成AI機能には使用回数等制限が設けられています。今回紹介するSAP Build Appsのページ生成機能は「1ヶ月1ユーザーあたり100リクエスト」という制限があります。

 

 

使ってみる

この機能はBTP Destinationを使用したIntegrationに機能します。テストとしてはCUDの操作が確認できるようにCAPを使用してSAP HANA Cloudデータベースのテーブルに対してODataを使用できるようにしたものが望ましいですが、ない場合はおなじみのNorthwindサービスに対してDestinationを設定しても良いでしょう。

BTP DestinationをIntegrationsでSAP Build Appsで使用できるようにします。ODataであればその中のエンティティを有効化すると

このようにこれまでなかった「Generate Pages」というボタンが表示されます。早速クリックしてみましょう。

ページ一覧を確認すると

このようにページが3つ追加され、スタートページに設定したページに一覧表示へのリンクボタンが追加されます。プレビューで実行してテストしてみましょう。

スタートページに追加されたボタンをクリックすると

データの一覧表示のページに移行します。右上のAddボタンをクリックすると

データの追加用のフォームに移動します。記入してSaveボタンをクリックすると実際に新規行として保存することが出来ます。

一覧表示のページで表示されている行をクリックすると

その行のデータの詳細表示することが出来ます。右上のDeleteボタンをクリックすると

ダイアログが表示され、実際に削除することが出来ます。Editボタンをクリックすると

データ編集用のページに飛び、実際に編集保存することが可能です。

ほぼ一瞬でこのようにページが生成されます。大したものです。

私が個人的に「おっ！」と思ったのが、いま1つのエンティティに対してページを生成しました。この状態で他のエンティティに対してのページを生成させると

このようにスタートページにもう一つ追加したエンティティ用のボタンが表示されることです。メニューのようになりますので便利ですね。

生成されたページは当然編集が可能です。好きなデザインに変えるもよしですし、例えば削除は出来ないように削除用のロジックやボタンを削除するということも出来ます。現在は入力フォームなどでデータ型のチェックは行っておらず、例えば数値型のフィールドに文字を入力することが出来てしまう等の問題がありますので、加えるとしたらそういうロジックでしょうか？
突き詰めていくと不満は出てきますが、しかしながらここまで簡単にページが生成できるというのは非常に楽です。例えばデータベース上のマスターテーブルの編集アプリなんてODataで公開してさえいれば、この機能を使えばあっという間に出来てしまうということになりますので。

アプリのベースとして十分使える機能です。ぜひ使ってみてください。

※現在BTP DestinationのREST APIに関しては動作はするものの、listで返されるデータを基準にしてロジックを組んでしまうようで CUD操作に関してはうまく動きません。ODataのみ対応と考えたほうが良さそうです。

entry.title: Re: SAC – Integrated Financial Planning – DRIVER6 & alloc...
entry.content:
Hi, @Susanne_Helbig !

Thanks for the quick and detailed answer. Unfortunately, when following the provided documentation, my search does not show the folder Statistical Key Figures – FINSSKF nor does it show C_FinStatisticalKeyFigure. The closest to this is A_StatisticalKeyFigure, but this does not seem to be correct based on the related data.

Unlike the other import jobs, this import job was not pre-delievered when I imported the business content.

Note, please, that I have also found other queries in the documentation which were not pre-delieverd with the business content and I also could not build in the system.

 

Do you know what could be causing this? Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Is it possible to change S-User first and last name?
entry.content:
Would it be possible to update the First and Last name for user?  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change S-User first and last name?
entry.content:
According to KBA2597456 - How to update the S-user ID name - SAP for Me - SAP for Me , currently it is not possible to change the name on an S-user ID without contacting SAP. S-user IDs are intended to be used only by one individual since there is history tied to each S-user ID (e.g. authorizations, incidents, Service Messages, Certifications, etc). Due to this, SAP does not allow S-user IDs to be reused/transferred/overwritten to other individuals -- and the e-mail address should match the S-user's first and last name.

To prevent reuse of an S-user ID by a different person, it is currently not allowed to change personal contact details (first and last names) for an S-user ID. Note: S-users can update limited information for their own S-user ID such as phone number or e-mail address, and some data can only be changed by the administrators (see KBA 1271545).

If a name update is required for an S-user ID, SAP can make the changes only for the following reasons as long as the S-user ID is for the same person (not a different person):

  • Name is spelled incorrectly
  • First name and last name (surname) data is transposed in the wrong fields
  • The first letter is mistakenly lowercase.
  • Legal name changed (e.g. marital status change, gender change, etc.)

entry.title: Re: How to Read Data Stored in SAP Datasphere from SAP BW Bridge
entry.content:
Nicely Documented, but found few open queries.

Query1:

At Step 5, you mentioned to use created outbound service which was created at step 4 as service type "Outbound SQL Access", but I seen screen shot which you mentioned in step 5 shows as service type as "Logical External Schema". 

Query2: When I do data preview, I get error "Error while processing authorization checks". Anything related to authorization missing in document ?

entry.title: Re: Unable to edit infoobjects in the BW modeller
entry.content: Let your user admin add the needed authorizations to your user.

entry.title: Re: The SAP BW Data Product Generator for SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Chris_Kornely,

note 3590400 has been released. Please check pricing questions with your account.

Best Regards

Christof

entry.title: Re: Collected information regarding partitioning in SAP HANA (with examples)
entry.content:
Hi @Laszlo_Thoma ,

wow that was fast! You also created directly a new note 3597928 - "How to merge specific RANGE partitions in already partitioned table which contains data in SAP HANA?" - also thank you for this! This was also an often question from customers. May be you can add the detail that the "online" process can also be used for it but will touch all partitions and not only affected partitions. This should be crystal clear because this is how the online method is working (always copy all data), but some customers still ask for it.

Regards,

Jens

entry.title: Re: The SAP BW Data Product Generator for SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @JoelleS ,

the scope is SAP Databricks only.

Best Regards

Christof

entry.title: Re: Prerequisites for migrating BW 7.5 SPS10 from SQL Ser...
entry.content:
Hi Appuru

 

Check the corresponding guide in the guide finder:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER/9e41ead9f54e44c1ae1a1094b0f80712/576f5c1808de4d1abecbd6e503c9ba42.html?language=en-US

According the guide finder:

  • Migrate to new database
  • Netweaver 7.5
  • Target DB is HANA

this is the document you need: https://help.sap.com/doc/38301960cfe4484587f9cedb8c6a740f/dmosum20.22/en-US/dmo_of_sum2_to_hana.pdf

Chapter 4 speaks about "Preparation".

 

br

Roland

entry.title: SAP PS Today
entry.content:
SAP Project Systems(PS) today

 This Blog is the ready reckoner for the SAP PS as on date and the journey with SAP B1, ECC, S4 HANA, S4 HANA -Professional Services.

High Level Comparison

 

SAP B1

SAP ECC

S4 HANA (1909 & 2020)

S4HANA-Public Cloud (Grow with SAP)

S4 HANA- On Prem (RISE with SAP)

Use the Project Management module to manage your projects from start to finish, centralizing all project related transactions, documents, resources, and activities. The feature helps you to monitor the progress of tasks, stages, subprojects, analyze budget costs, and generate reports on various aspects of the project, such as stage analysis, open issues, and resources.

The Project System (PS) in SAP ECC 6.0 is a module that helps manage projects from start to finish. It allows users to monitor and control all aspects of a project, including technical and commercial aspects.

The PS (Project Systems) module in SAP S/4HANA is a project management tool that helps organizations plan, manage, and execute projects.

The SAP Project System (PS) module in SAP S/4 HANA is part of the GROW with SAP program, which helps companies grow their business by adopting SAP S/4 HANA Cloud. The PS module helps with project planning, execution, monitoring, and more. 

The Project System (PS) module in SAP S/4HANA on-premise helps project managers plan, execute, and close projects. It also helps analyze project data and integrate with other modules. 

 

How it works:

Project Type

BP Code

Contact Person

BP Territory

Sales Employee

Owner

Project with Subprojects

Project Name

Project Number

Status

Start Date

Closing Date

Due Date

Open activities

Completeness %

Financial Project

How it works:

  • Work breakdown structure (WBS)

Users can create a WBS to structure their project by phase, logic, or object. 

  • Material transfer

Users can transfer material components from the product structure of Integrated Product and Process Engineering (iPPE) to the PS. 

  • Project planning

Users can create detailed plans for the project, including individual activities and work packages. 

  • Project execution

Users can ensure that the project is executed efficiently, on time, and within budget. 

  • Project monitoring

Users can monitor the progress of the project, including technical and commercial aspects. 

 

How it works:

  • Project planning: Define project structures, work breakdown structures (WBS), and project networks 
  • Resource management: Allocate and manage resources like personnel, materials, and equipment 
  • Project scheduling: Create and manage project timelines, dependencies, and critical paths 
  • Budgeting and cost control: Create project budgets and track actual costs against planned budgets 
  • Integration: Integrates project data with other SAP modules like FI (Finance), CO (Controlling), MM (Materials Management), and HR (Human Resources)

 

How it works:

  • The PS module is integrated with other tools like MSP and Primavera
  • The PS module can help you quickly calculate product costs and the impact of changes

Who it's for 

  • GROW with SAP is designed for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and startups that are looking to grow
  • It's also a good option for companies that prefer a high degree of standardization and want to use the public cloud

 

How it works:

  • Set up master data: Define project system master data, including work breakdown structures (WBS) and networks
  • Plan and execute projects: Plan project costs and logistics, and execute project activities
  • Close projects: Manage period-end close for plan and actual data
  • Analyze project data: Use Project System reports to analyze project structures, financials, and logistics
  • Integrate with other modules: Integrate with other modules, such as portfolio and project management (PPM)

 

RISE with SAP 

  • RISE with SAP is a managed cloud service that helps organizations migrate from on-premise ERP software to the cloud
  • RISE with SAP includes cloud ERP, process intelligence, and execution, along with migration services

 

 

Usage of Project Systems:

Pharma,

Manufacturing,

Professional Services

Aerospace & Defense

Utilities

Real Estate Management

 

PS Integrations with other modules/packages:

MM-Materials Management

SD – Sales and Distribution

FICO- Financial Accounting & Controlling

RE-FX- Flexible Real Estate Management

SAP -Joint Venture Accounting

HCM – Human Capital Management

PM – Plant Maintenance

Concur – Travel & Expense

CATS – Cross Application Time sheet

EPPM – Enterprise Portfolio & Project Management

SAC – SAP Cloud Analytics

 

Use friendly accessories today for PS;

Fiori Apps

Bots

Automation

Testing Tools

Migration Tools

 

Conclusion:

SAP PS has evolved from ECC days to right now Professional S4 HANA – Public Cloud. Tailor made suits to fulfill different business segment demands. Implementation time has come down drastically from 12-16 months to 6-8 months. SAP PS is being used and adopted globally on a large scale by users than before and this module is here to stay.

entry.title: Re: Sales Pricing Condition Discount applied only on a sp...
entry.content: Thanks for the idea, but that does not seem to work, as well. If the routine that holds KZWI4 is assigned to ZFRD, then ZFRD then cares only for the value in KZWI4. Then if the net price reaches the treshold for the discount, the system does not care. It only cares if ZFRC is above the treshold.

entry.title: Re: DTIS Table not getting updated
entry.content:
RSDTIS_LIST_REQUEST is delivered with the Note 3404152. If you want to use this, the note must be installed first.

Also check the KBA:

3037467 - [BW Central KBA] DTIS overview and important notes
